## etude retro generate

Generate a retro by invoking an external generator script over covered run artifacts

```
etude retro generate <scope> [flags]
```

### Options

```
      --bead stringArray          bead id of a subject bead (repeatable)
      --bench string              bench id (for bench scope)
      --decision string           retro decision: accepted, deferred, superseded, or informational
      --eval string               eval id (for bench scope)
      --gate string               gate reference as stage@attempt (for phase/gate scopes)
      --generator string          generator command spec (e.g. ./gen.sh); falls back to git config etude.retroGenerator
      --git-sha string            repo git sha at capture time
      --harness string            agent runtime that produced this retro
      --harness-version string    version of the agent runtime
  -h, --help                      help for generate
      --message string            retro ref commit message
      --model string              LLM model used (if any)
      --ref stringArray           additional ref as key=value (repeatable)
      --skill-id string           skill id (default "retro")
      --skill-repo string         skill repo (default "manual")
      --skill-version string      skill version (default "manual")
      --stage string              stage name to use for each subject run; required when a subject run has multiple stages
      --subject-run stringArray   run id of a subject run (repeatable; >=1 required unless scope=workflow)
      --supersedes string         retro id this retro supersedes
      --trigger string            trigger that prompted this retro (e.g. manual, post-bench) (default "manual")
```
